title: BigID Actionable Insights Case
description: Schema describing a single DSPM/posture case returned by GET /api/v1/actionable-insights/all-cases.

severityLevel.description: Severity scoring for the underlying risk.

policyName.description: Name of the BigID policy that flagged the issue.

dataSourceName.description: Data source the affected asset lives in.

auditReason.description: Audit reason recorded when changing the case status.
